A

Returns the value of the activities record component.
Activity - Class in com.example.cab302studyslice.Model
Represents a tracked application activity with duration.
Activity() - Constructor for class com.example.cab302studyslice.Model.Activity
Creates an empty activity.
Activity(String, int) - Constructor for class com.example.cab302studyslice.Model.Activity
Creates an activity with the specified app name and duration.
addActivity(Activity) - Method in class com.example.cab302studyslice.Model.SessionHistoryEntry
Adds an activity to this session.
addSession(String) - Static method in class com.example.cab302studyslice.Model.HistoryStore
Adds a completed study session to the history storage.
AiAPI - Class in com.example.cab302studyslice.Model
Integration with Google Generative AI (Gemini) for session analysis.
AiAPI() - Constructor for class com.example.cab302studyslice.Model.AiAPI
 
AiAPI.WrappedData - Class in com.example.cab302studyslice.Model
Structured data returned by AI session analysis.
analyzeSession(SessionHistoryEntry) - Static method in class com.example.cab302studyslice.Model.AiAPI
Analyzes a study session and returns a friendly summary.
analyzeSessionStructured(SessionHistoryEntry, List<SessionHistoryEntry>) - Static method in class com.example.cab302studyslice.Model.AiAPI
Analyzes a session and returns structured data for the Wrapped feature.

initialize() - Method in class com.example.cab302studyslice.Controller.TimerController
 
initialize() - Method in class com.example.cab302studyslice.Controller.WrappedBadHabitController
Initialises the wrapped bad habit page by loading wrapped session data, playing the decorative face animation, and revealing the page content.
initialize() - Method in class com.example.cab302studyslice.Controller.WrappedComparisonController
Initialises the wrapped comparison page by loading wrapped session data, starting the animated background, and revealing the page content.
initialize() - Method in class com.example.cab302studyslice.Controller.WrappedFocusScoreController
Initialises the wrapped focus score page by loading wrapped session data, starting the animated background, and revealing the page content.
initialize() - Method in class com.example.cab302studyslice.Controller.WrappedGoodHabitController
Initialises the wrapped good habit page by loading wrapped session data, playing the decorative face animation, and revealing the page content.
initialize() - Method in class com.example.cab302studyslice.Controller.WrapperController
Initialises the wrapped introduction page by starting the background animation and revealing the page content in sequence.
